code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut stopped = false

while i < n and not stopped
  mut ws = true
  while ws and i < n
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        ws = false
      end
    when None
      ws = false
    end
  end

  if i >= n
    stopped = true
  else
    mut neg = false
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      else if c == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      stopped = true
    end

    mut value = 0
    mut reading = true
    while reading and i < n
      match string.byte_at(text, i)
      when Some(c)
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          value = value * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      when None
        reading = false
      end
    end

    if neg
      let signed = 0 - value
      if signed < 0
        stopped = true
      else
        sum = sum + signed
      end
    else
      sum = sum + value
    end
  end
end

print("partial=#{sum}")
